markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animal Companion Specialization " pfs="Standard">[Ambusher](/Companions.aspx?ID=1&Specialized=true)</title>

**Source** [Core Rulebook](/Sources.aspx?ID=1) pg. 217

 

In your companion's natural environment, it can use a [Sneak](/Actions.aspx?ID=63) action even if it's currently observed. Its proficiency rank in [Stealth](/Skills.aspx?ID=15) increases to expert (or master if it was already an expert from its type), and its Dexterity modifier increases by 1. Its proficiency rank for unarmored defense increases to expert.
name: Ambusher

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animal Companion Specialization " pfs="Standard">[Wind Chaser](/Companions.aspx?ID=10&Specialized=true)</title>

**Source** [Legends](/Sources.aspx?ID=40) pg. 123

 

Your companion gains a +20-foot status bonus to its Speed or fly Speed (your choice if it has both). Its proficiency in [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=1) increases to master and its Dexterity modifier increases by 1. Its proficiency rank increases to legendary for Reflex saves and to expert for unarmored defense. This specialization can only be selected by [djinni-touched companions](/Companions.aspx?Type=Advancement&ID=4).
name: Wind Chaser

This specialization can only be selected by djinni-touched companions.

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animal Companion Specialization " pfs="Standard">[Shade](/Companions.aspx?ID=12&Specialized=true)</title>

**Source** [Secrets of Magic](/Sources.aspx?ID=96) pg. 229

**Access** [Shadowcaster](/Archetypes.aspx?ID=101)

Your companion's physical form is made, in whole or in part, of shadow. It gains [darkvision](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=12), resistance 5 to all damage except [force](/Traits.aspx?ID=75), and in areas of dim light or darkness, it can Step 10 feet instead of 5 feet. Its proficiency rank in unarmored defense increases to expert. 

 A [Shadowcaster](/Archetypes.aspx?ID=101) has access to this specialization.

_Nethys Note: The Shade animal companion specialization was affected by the [_Core Rulebook_ 3rd printing errata](https://paizo.com/pathfinder/faq) that reduced the nimble animal companion's proficiency with unarmored defense._
name: Shade

It gains darkvision, resistance 5 to all damage except force, and in areas of dim light or darkness, it can Step 10 feet instead of 5 feet. Its proficiency rank in unarmored defense increases to expert. A Shadowcaster has access to this specialization. Nethys Note: The Shade animal companion specialization was affected by the Core Rulebook 3rd printing errata that reduced the nimble animal companion's proficiency with unarmored defense.

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animal Companion Specialization " pfs="Standard">[Bully](/Companions.aspx?ID=14&Specialized=true)</title>

**Source** [Player Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=216) pg. 211

 

Your companion terrorizes foes with dominance displays and pushes them around the battlefield. Its proficiency ranks for [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36) and [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=40) increase to expert (or master if it was already expert from its type), its Strength modifier increases by 1, and its Charisma modifier increases by 3.

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animal Companion Specialization " pfs="Standard">[Daredevil](/Companions.aspx?ID=15&Specialized=true)</title>

**Source** [Player Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=216) pg. 211

 

Your companion joins the fray with graceful leaps and dives. It gains the deny advantage ability, so it isn’t [off-guard](/Conditions.aspx?ID=58) to [hidden](/Conditions.aspx?ID=79), [undetected](/Conditions.aspx?ID=96), or [flanking](/Rules.aspx?ID=2375) creatures unless such a creature’s level is greater than yours. Its proficiency rank in [Acrobatics](/Skills.aspx?ID=34) increases to master, and its Dexterity modifier increases by 1. Its proficiency rank in unarmored defense increases to expert.
name: Daredevil

<title level="1" right="Animal Companion Specialization " pfs="Standard">[Racer](/Companions.aspx?ID=16&Specialized=true)</title>

**Source** [Player Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=216) pg. 211

 

Your companion races. It gains a +10-foot status bonus to its Speed, [swim Speed](/Rules.aspx?ID=2351), or [fly Speed](/Rules.aspx?ID=2350) (your choice). Its proficiency in Fortitude saves increases to legendary, and its Constitution modifier increases by 1.

**Source** [Player Core](/Sources.aspx?ID=216) pg. 211

 

Your companion is an incredible tracker. It can move at full Speed while [following tracks](/Actions.aspx?ID=2408). Its proficiency rank in [Survival](/Skills.aspx?ID=49) increases to expert (or master if it was already an expert from its type), and its Wisdom modifier increases by 1.

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animal Companion Specialization " pfs="Standard">[Deep Diver](/Companions.aspx?ID=7&Specialized=true)</title>

**Source** [Legends](/Sources.aspx?ID=40) pg. 123

 

Your companion gains a swim Speed of 30 feet or a +10-foot status bonus to its existing swim Speed and can breathe underwater if it couldn't already. Its Constitution modifier increases by 1. Its proficiency rank for [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=3) increases to master and for barding increases to expert. This specialization can only be selected by [marid-touched companions](/Companions.aspx?Type=Advancement&ID=4).

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animal Companion Specialization " pfs="Standard">[Steadfast Strider](/Companions.aspx?ID=8&Specialized=true)</title>

**Source** [Legends](/Sources.aspx?ID=40) pg. 123

 

Your companion ignores natural difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain from sediment or stone and can move across quicksand, mud, and similar surfaces as if they were solid. It gains a +2 status bonus to saving throws and DCs to prevent being [Shoved](/Actions.aspx?ID=38) or [Tripped](/Actions.aspx?ID=40). Its Strength modifier increases by 1 and its proficiency for barding increases to expert. This specialization can only be selected by [shaitan-touched companions](/Companions.aspx?Type=Advancement&ID=4).
name: Steadfast Strider

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Animal Companion Specialization " pfs="Standard">[Wildfire Scorcher](/Companions.aspx?ID=9&Specialized=true)</title>

**Source** [Legends](/Sources.aspx?ID=40) pg. 123

 

Your companion gains resistance to fire equal to your level. Any creature that attempts to [Grapple](/Actions.aspx?ID=35) or [Grab](/MonsterAbilities.aspx?ID=18) your companion, hits your companion with a melee unarmed attack, or hits your companion with a melee weapon Strike while adjacent to your companion takes 2d6 fire damage. Its Dexterity modifier increases by 1 and its proficiency rank increases to legendary for Reflex saves and to expert for unarmored defense. This specialization can only be selected by [efreeti-touched companions](/Companions.aspx?Type=Advancement&ID=4).
name: Wildfire Scorcher
